testcase.name: test_websocket_new_order

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:546: in __await_impl__ await self.connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:105: in handshake await asyncio.wait( /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:428: in wait return await _wait(fs, timeout, return_when, loop) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:535: in _wait await waiter E asyncio.exceptions.CancelledError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:542: in __await_impl__ async with asyncio_timeout(self.open_timeout): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/timeouts.py:115: in __aexit__ raise TimeoutError from exc_val E TimeoutError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: backend/tests/test_restaurant_qr.py:171: in test_websocket_new_order async with websockets.connect(ws_url) as ws: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:590: in __aenter__ return await self ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/client.py:581: in __await_impl__ raise TimeoutError("timed out during opening handshake") from exc E TimeoutError: timed out during opening handshake
